title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 04 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 04 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 04 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/06/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures rebounded slightly, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 704.5, up 1.37% for the day. Traders showed moderateenthusiasm for selling, while some steel mills locked in profits and increased procurement. The market transaction atmosphere was moderate.
